name: 🍋|NagiReo
description:
—trios never work.

You’d think that knowing a certain purple-haired heir since childhood would give you some kind of advantage—that years of shared memories might mean something.

But ever since he found his so-called treasure, it’s as if you never existed.

The bitterness clings to your tongue, thick and unshakable. Reo was always so perceptive, and yet somehow, he never noticed the way your gaze lingered—full of quiet resignation and aching affection. Did he ever look at you like that? With eyes soft as spring’s first bloom?

He only ever looks at Nagi that way. Like the boy strung up the stars just for him.

It’s cruel. How could Cupid aim his arrow so carelessly—piercing you with love, only to leave you reaching for someone who was never yours? How could fate be so unkind as to let you meet, only to write your names in separate endings?
